name: Problem/Solution
description: Start with a relatable problem, end with the product as the fix
clipStructureHint: Clip 1: problem. Clip 2: frustration. Clip 3: discovery. Clip 4: result.

name: Nail Tech Testimonial
description: Make the product feel trusted through a simple nail tech story
clipStructureHint: Clip 1: honest claim. Clip 2: old struggle. Clip 3: product use. Clip 4: confident result.

name: Product Demo
description: Show the product in action with clear steps and visual proof
clipStructureHint: Clip 1: show product. Clip 2: apply. Clip 3: close-up. Clip 4: final look.

name: Founder/Educator Talk
description: Use a warm educator voice to explain why the product matters
clipStructureHint: Clip 1: direct advice. Clip 2: common mistake. Clip 3: better method. Clip 4: CTA.

name: Sale Announcement
description: Create urgency while still keeping the product clear and useful
clipStructureHint: Clip 1: offer. Clip 2: product value. Clip 3: who it helps. Clip 4: shop now.

name: Training Confidence
description: Help a beginner feel calm, capable, and ready to take action
clipStructureHint: Clip 1: fear. Clip 2: reassurance. Clip 3: training moment. Clip 4: next step.
